arts.ttl: Five players who could leave Chelsea this summer
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku was heavily tipped to leave Chelsea in January and although he remained at Stamford Bridge, a summer exit is certainly on the cards. Enzo Maresca has openly admitted that Ben Chilwell doesn’t fit his football philosophy and the former England left-back is therefore set to leave Chelsea on a permanent deal this summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea could finally replace Antonio Rudiger with brand new transfer target, Virgil van Dijk thinks he's 'outstanding' - opinion
arts.sum: They've made an enquiry to sign him! 🤩

arts.ttl: Fernandez role changed, injured player returns, Nkunku dropped - Chelsea lineups vs Arsenal - football.london
arts.sum: Coley's XI: Sanchez; James, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Caicedo, Fernandez, Lavia; Palmer, Neto, George. That is a good-looking back four but might still be changed if Maresca wanted to put James into midfield with Malo Gusto returning.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Premier League predictions including Arsenal vs. Chelsea
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Arsenal vs. Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Arsenal approach Martin Odegaard point of no return with dangerous Chelsea risk for Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Since returning to the Arsenal team in November, Martin Odegaard has started all but four of 29 matches. Kai Havertz's injury and the loss of Gabriel Jesus in January have left Odegaard as the only senior attacking force with any bite in this Arsenal team.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Arsenal: Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea could climb to third in the Premier League with a win vs. Arsenal at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's stunning new-look starting XI after Guimaraes transfer and Partey exit
arts.sum: The Gunners are in need of additions across the pitch, but it is the engine room that is in need of changes despite the recent arrivals of Declan Rice and Mikel Merino. Given his Premier League experience, Guimaraes starting off in that role would be the expectation with Rice remaining further forward.

arts.ttl: Marc Guehi outlines transfer preference amid Chelsea interest and Tottenham bid
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has entered the final 18 months of his contract at Selhurst Park and there is an expectation that he is going to leave the club, unless he signs a new deal, in the summer transfer window. Liverpool are set to win the race to sign Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi, it has been claimed.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Chelsea: Premier League
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli's return to fitness should allow Mikel Arteta to field a more natural attack.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal host Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.
